title: CallEndedEvent
description: Payload POSTed by the media bot to the orchestrator at /webhooks/call-ended.

meetingId.description: Our internal meeting id; correlation id across all three services.

chatThreadId.description: Teams meeting chat thread id, captured by the bot on join. Used to post the MoM card.

organizerId.description: AAD object id of the meeting organizer. Calendar events are created on this user.

participants.description: Final roster observed during the call.

startedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the bot joined / call started.

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the call ended.
